prompt: Create an ultra-realistic macro photograph from inside a transparent glass cat food bowl looking outward at a brown tabby cat licking the food. Use an extreme wide-angle fisheye perspective with the circular glass rim forming a bright distorted ring around the frame. The cat’s face fills the upper center: pink nose close to camera, striped tabby muzzle, sharp white whiskers radiating left and right, partially visible eyes above the nose, ears near the top edge. The cat’s wet pink tongue is extended straight down into the bowl and dominates the center foreground, showing highly detailed rough papillae texture, moisture, tiny glossy highlights, and a realistic damp surface. The bottom third of the image is filled with brown dry cat kibble, individual pellets large in the foreground with shallow depth of field and warm golden-brown texture. Background beyond the bowl is softly blurred indoor space with warm ceiling lights, subtle plant shapes, and window reflections. Lighting is warm natural indoor daylight with specular reflections on the glass rim and tongue, crisp macro detail on the tongue and muzzle, cinematic realism, 16:9 horizontal composition, no text, no watermark.
